stemHtml:
What should be considered when using the following NOTAM information from the transmitter during the validity period?

Q) EDGG/QNNCS/IV/BO/AE/000/999/5049N00638E025 A) ETNN B) FROM: 15/11/11 09:00 C) TO: 16/02/10 21:50 EST E) AD ETNN: MOBILE TACAN NOE CH79Y IN USE. PSN 504947N0063847E 259DEG 859M FROM ARP.

options.a: The transmitter may move from the position indicated.
options.b: The slant range indications are only valid for the position indicated.
options.c: An approach to the ARP is possible by following the 259 degree radial.
options.d: The distance indications have to be adjusted by 859 metres.
